context: Source: Video 2: Intro to Component Builder (11:27). Evolution: charmeleon. MCP tool: synapse_solaris_set_purpose. Live validated: T3 PASS (H21.0.631). Constraints: Every production asset should have at minimum render + proxy purpose defined.; Render purpose = full-res geometry shown at final render time.; Proxy purpose = low-poly version shown in viewport for interactive performance.
